children.heading: Payment by State
children.label: 1 Payment by State
children.text: The State shall pay to the extent of amounts received by it from the Secretary under this part, to each applicant having an application approved under , the Federal share of the cost of the program described in the application.section 3997 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), the Federal share for each fiscal year shall be 75 percent.

children.label: B
children.text: In the case of an applicant that receives a waiver under , the Federal share for each fiscal year may be as much as 100 percent.section 3995(c) of this title

children.heading: Non-Federal share
children.label: 3 Non-Federal share
children.text: The non-Federal share of payments under this part may be in cash or in kind, fairly evaluated, including plant, equipment, or services.
an amount equal to its share of funds appropriated under chapter 1 of the Education Consolidation and Improvement Act; or

children.heading: Reduction for insufficient funding
children.label: c Reduction for insufficient funding
children.text: If sums appropriated to carry out this part are not sufficient to permit the Secretary to pay in full the grants which States may receive under subsection (b), the amount of such grants shall be ratably reduced.
